title: Fix docs pre-publication issues: placeholder GIFs, TOC collapse, swarm SVG alignment

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Three issues: (1) Comment out 5 placeholder GIF references that don't have generated files yet, (2) Investigate TOC collapse with full-width images, (3) Fix swarm SVG arrow/text alignment — multiple issues with opacity-based shapes instead of multiply blend, and arrow positioning

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Committed 9e49338: commented out 5 placeholder GIFs, fixed XML escaping in 3 SVG generators (knowledge, design, swarm), improved swarm diagram layout, removed .column-page-right to fix TOC overlap. 12 files changed, 41 insertions, 40 deletions.

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Committed a631b3c: fixed design-flow SVG <slug> escaping, restored .column-page-right with CSS fix for TOC overlay (background + z-index adjustment for sticky stacking context), incorporated user page edits. 7 files changed.
